title: Build License Register; verify every M0 source
context: No source enters the structuring pipeline until its license/terms are recorded and confirmed to permit reuse and derivatives, per the binding cancer guardrails. This License Register is a verification-before-ingest gate covering the trial registries and terminology vocabularies. Verbatim source spans stay under their source terms; the project licenses only its own annotations and structure.
objective: Produce a per-source License Register that verifies every M0 source (ClinicalTrials.gov API v2, WHO ICTRP, EU CTIS/EudraCT, ISRCTN, and each terminology) for reuse, derivative, attribution, and redistribution terms, and records the output-licensing decision.
acceptanceCriteria: Every source (ClinicalTrials.gov v2, ICTRP, CTIS/EudraCT, ISRCTN, and each terminology) has a row recording license/terms, reuse + derivative permission, attribution, and redistribution constraints.
Sources with unclear terms are explicitly marked excluded; NCIt confirmed as the primary terminology.
Output-license decision recorded (Apache-2.0 for code / CC-BY-4.0 for our annotations); verbatim spans kept under source terms with attribution.
Notes the ClinicalTrials.gov sponsor-copyright caveat: no non-open protocol PDFs ingested.
resources: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 Terms of Use
WHO ICTRP, EU CTIS/EudraCT, ISRCTN data-use terms
NCIt, HGNC, RxNorm, LOINC, ICD-O-3, HPO, SNOMED CT license terms
